name: Kompose — Trace Explorer
description: Vercel-style request log with exact endpoints, status codes, latency stats, and trace drill-down. Filter by endpoint, status class, or trace ID.

apl.apl: ['kompose-api-prod'] | where kind == 'server' | extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])) | where isnotempty(endpoint) | distinct endpoint | project key=endpoint, value=endpoint | sort by key asc

query.apl:
declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint endswith 'sync/events')
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize ['Requests'] = count()

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint endswith 'sync/events')
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status >= 500)
| extend ['Error Rate'] = iff(total > 0, round(100.0 * errors / total, 2), 0.0)
| project ['Error Rate']

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint startswith '/api/rpc/sync')
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize ['p95'] = round(percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000, 0)
| project ['p95']

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint endswith 'sync/events') and status >= 500
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize ['Errors'] = count()

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint endswith 'sync/events')
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize ['req/min'] = count() by bin_auto(_time)

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code'])
| where not(endpoint endswith 'sync/events')
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status >= 500) by bin_auto(_time)
| extend ['error_rate_%'] = iff(total > 0, round(100.0 * errors / total, 2), 0.0)
| project _time, ['error_rate_%']

declare query_parameters (endpoint_filter:string = "", status_filter:string = "", trace_search:string = "");
['kompose-api-prod']
| where kind == 'server'
| extend endpoint = extract('^([^?]+)', 1, tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.target'])), status = toint(['attributes.custom']['http.status_code']), method = tostring(['attributes.custom']['http.method'])
| where isempty(endpoint_filter) or endpoint == endpoint_filter
| where isempty(status_filter) or tostring(status) startswith status_filter
| where isempty(trace_search) or trace_id contains trace_search
| order by _time desc
| take 500
